raw_consumer_statement: I have ( XXXX ) charges from Macys that I did not purchase & have disputed for ( XXXX ) months. I have called ( XXXX ) times & spoke with the fraud dept. & never received any info I have requested, just letters that I am responsible. I explained that the items in question do not fit my purchase history nor have they produced my signature. I have now been told that the case is closed, done.
